name: S3 Ransomware via Client-Side Encryption
description: Simulates a ransomware attack that downloads each S3 object, encrypts it client-side with a symmetric key, re-uploads as <key>.encrypted, and deletes the original — leaving data inaccessible without the attacker's key.
detection_signal: Pattern of GetObject + PutObject (new key with .encrypted suffix) + DeleteObject for the same object — classic ransomware CloudTrail signature
